info.title: Mall API
info.description: 多租户商城 API。/auth、/products、/orders、/orders/:id/pay 等业务路径需 tenant Bearer JWT；/admin/* 需 platform Bearer JWT；/healthz、/readyz、/metrics、/webhooks/* 公开。

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Tenant 用户注册 / 登录

200.description: Reset token issued (dev returns it directly; prod sends email)
Cart item upserted (existing quantity is incremented)

201.description: Cart materialized into a pending order; cart cleared

200.description: Payment detail with related order(items) and tenant
Orders across all users in this tenant
Order detail with user / coupon / payments (any user in tenant)
